agent1_output.reasoning: Identified core game lifecycle: Host creates, Joiner joins. Prioritized negative tests (join non-existent room) before positive actions. Ensured multi-user flow with separate tabs and explicit user switching. Consolidated multiple mentions of 'guest not seeing game' into a single, critical verification. Incorporated all feature requests and bug fixes (host name, solo play, game continuation, card sums, ace values, winner/credits, kick, double, chat, start game, single bet display) into the logical flow.

ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: The application landing page is displayed

ux_tasks.requirement: User 1 (Host) creates a new game, provides a name, and verifies initial lobby UI
steps: Verify 'Game Code' is displayed and extract its value
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Game created, unique game code displayed, 'Bet' text appears once, and 'Start Game' button is enabled

ux_tasks.requirement: User 1 (Host) plays a full single-player round including 'Double' functionality, verifies card sums, ace values, winner/credits, and game continuation
steps: Verify 'Player Card Sum' is visible and displays a numeric value
Verify 'Dealer Card Sum' is visible and displays a numeric value (for visible cards)
If 'Ace' card is present, Locate 'Card Value' display for that card
If 'Ace' card is present, Verify 'Card Value' display shows '1/11' (or similar combined value)
If 'Double' button is present, Click 'Double' button
If 'Double' button was not present, Locate 'Hit' button
If 'Double' button was not present, Click 'Hit' button
Verify 'Credits Change' display is visible and shows earnings/loss
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Game completes a round, card sums and ace values are displayed correctly, winner/credits are shown, and a new round begins

ux_tasks.requirement: Open new tab for User 2 (Joiner) and access app URL
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: App loads successfully in new tab

ux_tasks.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) cannot join with a non-existent room code (Negative Test)
steps: Verify 'Error Message' display contains 'Room not found' or similar text
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Error message indicating room not found is displayed

ux_tasks.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) successfully joins the game and verifies lobby visibility
steps: Type the extracted 'Game Code' from Task 2
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: User 2 sees the game lobby elements (player list, chat, game info) and the screen is not black

ux_tasks.requirement: User 1 (Host) verifies User 2 is present in the lobby
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: User 1 sees 'JoinerPlayer' in the player list

ux_tasks.requirement: User 1 (Host) kicks User 2 from the game
steps: Locate 'Kick' button next to 'JoinerPlayer' in the player list
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Confirmation of kick action (e.g., 'JoinerPlayer' removed from list) is displayed for User 1

ux_tasks.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) verifies disconnection and returns to the landing page
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: User 2 is returned to the initial landing page/disconnected state

ux_tasks.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) re-joins the game for multiplayer flow and chat testing
steps: Type the extracted 'Game Code' from Task 2
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: User 2 is back in the game lobby and visible to User 1

ux_tasks.requirement: User 1 (Host) sends a chat message, and User 2 (Joiner) receives it
steps: Verify 'Chat Window' displays 'HostPlayer: Hello from Host!'
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: User 2 sees the chat message sent by User 1

ux_tasks.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) sends a chat message, and User 1 (Host) receives it
steps: Verify 'Chat Window' displays 'JoinerPlayer: Hello from Joiner!'
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: User 1 sees the chat message sent by User 2
Game transition to betting phase or first cards dealt for both players

ux_tasks.requirement: User 1 (Host) places a bet for the multiplayer round
User 2 (Joiner) places a bet for the multiplayer round
Both users play a round of blackjack, verifying actions and game state
steps: Wait for turn to pass to 'JoinerPlayer'
If 'Double' button is present, Click 'Double' button
If 'Double' button was not present, Locate 'Stand' button
If 'Double' button was not present, Click 'Stand' button
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Both players can take actions, and round results are correctly displayed for both users

ux_tasks.requirement: Both users verify the game continues to the next round after a multiplayer round
steps: Verify 'Betting' phase or new round initiation for both users
ux_tasks.acceptance_criteria: The game successfully transitions to a new round for all players

task_results.requirement: User 1 (Host) creates a new game, provides a name, and verifies initial lobby UI
task_results.observations: Lobby created successfully. Game code (FH7SEY) extracted. 'Bet: ' text was correctly absent (0 occurrences). 'Start Game' button was enabled.

task_results.requirement: User 1 (Host) plays a full single-player round including 'Double' functionality, verifies card sums, ace values, winner/credits, and game continuation
task_results.observations: Round completed successfully. However, a logic error was observed: the 'Double' action was allowed when the player's hand value was 20 (J, K), leading to an immediate bust (Value 27). This action should typically be disabled or unavailable on 20.

task_results.requirement: Open new tab for User 2 (Joiner) and access app URL
task_results.observations: New tab opened and application loaded successfully.

task_results.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) cannot join with a non-existent room code (Negative Test)
task_results.observations: The join attempt with code '9999' failed and the user remained on the 'Join Game' screen. Although the error message 'Game not found' was visually present, it was transient and could not be verified via DOM evaluation. The core negative test passed.

task_results.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) successfully joins the game and verifies lobby visibility
task_results.observations: Initial attempt failed because the Host had already started the game (Task 3), resulting in 'Game already started' error. Required manual reset of Host state and re-creation of lobby (new code: FH7SEY). Successful join achieved after state reset.
task_results.advice: Ensure players can only join when the game is strictly in the LOBBY state, or provide a clearer error message/mechanism if joining mid-game is intended but restricted.

task_results.requirement: User 1 (Host) verifies User 2 is present in the lobby
task_results.observations: Host successfully verified 'JoinerPlayer' was present in the player list after the successful join (Task 6 workaround).

task_results.requirement: User 1 (Host) kicks User 2 from the game
task_results.observations: Kick action was successful; 'JoinerPlayer' was immediately removed from the Host's player list.

task_results.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) verifies disconnection and returns to the landing page
task_results.observations: CRITICAL UX FRICTION: User 2 was kicked but was NOT automatically returned to the landing page. User 2 was stuck in a 'ghost lobby' state, showing only the Host and chat, requiring a manual navigation to the root URL to proceed.
task_results.advice: Implement automatic redirection to the landing page or a 'Disconnected' screen upon being kicked from the lobby.

task_results.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) re-joins the game for multiplayer flow and chat testing
task_results.observations: Re-join successful after manual reset of User 2's tab (due to Task 9 failure).

task_results.requirement: User 1 (Host) sends a chat message, and User 2 (Joiner) receives it
task_results.observations: Chat message 'Hello from Host!' sent and received successfully by User 2.

task_results.requirement: User 2 (Joiner) sends a chat message, and User 1 (Host) receives it
task_results.observations: Chat message 'Hello from Joiner!' sent and received successfully by User 1.
Game started successfully and transitioned both players to the BETTING phase.

task_results.requirement: User 1 (Host) places a bet for the multiplayer round
User 2 (Joiner) places a bet for the multiplayer round
Both users play a round of blackjack, verifying actions and game state
task_results.observations: Multiplayer round completed successfully. Host stood at 19. Joiner 'Doubled' on 15, resulting in a bust (23). Logic error noted: 'Double' was available and allowed on a hand of 15, which is generally acceptable, but highlights the availability of the action on non-standard hands, similar to Task 3. Results and credit changes were correctly displayed for both players.

task_results.requirement: Both users verify the game continues to the next round after a multiplayer round
task_results.observations: Host clicked 'Start Next Round', and the Joiner automatically transitioned to the 'BETTING' phase without requiring a separate 'Next Round' click. Game flow continued successfully.

task_results.summary: The application core functionality (game creation, betting, playing, chat) works. Critical UX issues were found in the lobby management flow: players cannot join a started game (Task 6 failure) and kicked players get stuck in a ghost lobby state, failing to redirect to the landing page (Task 9 failure). A logic error allows 'Double' action on high/mid hands (Tasks 3 & 16).
